site.title: Cloud Harbor
site.description: Cloud Harbor is a vendor preparing to sell at TWBC / TPC. This site collects booth details, product information, and upcoming updates.

hero.title: Cloud Harbor, a vendor preparing for TWBC / TPC
hero.intro: We are organizing booth details, planned products, and launch updates so visitors can quickly understand what Cloud Harbor is preparing.
hero.profileRole: TWBC Vendor / TPC Vendor / Booth Sales
hero.profileText: Cloud Harbor is preparing to sell at TWBC / TPC. Product details, booth information, and updates will be collected here as the event gets closer.

about.title: Cloud Harbor gathers the things we love into a booth of creative and practical goods.
about.title2: Preparing to meet everypony at TWBC & TPC.
about.body: This site will keep planned products, booth details, and future updates in one place. Whether visitors want to preview items before the event, check prices, or return later for new listings, they can quickly find Cloud Harbor's latest information here.

productSection.title: A quick preview of three planned items, giving you a feel for Cloud Harbor before the booth opens.

products.title: Cloud Harbor Shop
products.description: A marketplace-style product page for Cloud Harbor items, with search, filters, sorting, and detail pages.
products.shopSubtitle: Preparing for TWBC booth sales. Product details will keep updating.
products.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, tag, or ID

productDetail.notFoundText: This product may not be listed yet. Please return to the shop.

footer.quote: "Bring what we love to the booth, carefully."
